description_long: This object is a modern Samsung smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a centered punch-hole camera at the top, surrounded by a thin bezel. The back is a smooth, matte lavender surface with a triple camera array and flash arranged vertically in the upper left corner, and the 'SAMSUNG' logo centered below. The sides are slim and metallic, with visible buttons on the right edge for power and volume control. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass, metal, and plastic, giving it a premium yet durable feel. Its overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek Samsung smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, triple rear cameras, and a matte lavender finish. The device features a minimalist, modern design with metallic sides and subtle branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the expansive display with a centered punch-hole camera and minimal bezels.
description_view_1: Right side view reveals the slim profile and the placement of physical buttons.
description_view_2: Back view highlights the matte lavender finish, triple camera array, flash, and centered Samsung logo.
description_view_3: Left side view displays the uninterrupted slim metallic edge with no visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed 'SAMSUNG' text centered on the back in a subtle, slightly reflective finish.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with pink, purple, and blue brushstroke patterns. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Triple camera array vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a flash module to the right of the cameras.
attribute_button_layout: Two slim physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely serving as the power button and volume rocker.
